# Classifier reasoning dump

Generated 2026-05-19T01:13:24+00:00

Per-item trace of which tab/section assigned each item, via which
match path. Predicate descriptors are introspected from the factory's
closure cells where possible; falls back to qualname for module-level
predicates and to repr() for anything unrecognized.

## FLAGGED MISCLASSIFICATIONS

Specific items reported by in-game testing. Each block shows current
assignment(s), the rule that placed the item there, and (if a target
tab is given) why the item is or isn't matched by that tab's sections.
